scenario: Test a valid request with a city name as query parameter - should return matching cities
Test a valid request with US Zipcode as query parameter - should return locations for New York area
Test a valid request with UK Postcode as query parameter - should return London locations
Test a valid request with Latitude/Longitude as query parameter - should return nearby locations
Test a valid request with IP address as query parameter - should return location for IP
Test valid city name Paris - should return array of location objects with required fields
Test request with space in city name - should handle URL encoding correctly
Test autocomplete functionality with partial city name - should return matching locations
Test a valid request with Canada Postal code as query parameter
Test request with valid negative latitude and longitude for Sydney
Test request with unicode characters in city name - should handle international characters
Test valid international city name - should return Japanese location data
Test numeric-only query that could be a valid US zipcode
Test single character query parameter - should return matching locations or empty array
Test request with empty q parameter value - should return error code 1003
Test request with query that matches no location - should return error code 1006
Test request with malformed latitude/longitude format - should return validation error
Test request with latitude value out of valid range - should return error
Test request with invalid IP address format - should return error code 1006
Test request with whitespace-only query parameter - should return appropriate error
Test request with excessively long query parameter value - should handle gracefully
Test request with latitude below -90 degrees - should return validation error
Test request with longitude above 180 degrees - should return validation error
Test request with special characters only - should return no location found error
Test request without API key authentication - should return error code 1002
Test request with invalid API key - should return error code 2006
Test request with malformed API key format - should return authentication error
Test request with empty API key value - should return error code 1002
Test request with disabled API key - should return error code 2008
Test request with API key lacking resource access - should return error code 2009
Test request with maximum valid latitude and longitude boundary values
Test request with minimum valid latitude and longitude boundary values
Test request with zero coordinates - should return location near null island
Test multi-word city name with space - should return California locations
Test another multi-word US city name - should return matching locations
